name: global_context
description: Search only around low-cost global context mixing and point/global fusion.
prompt_extra: Build on the current best boundary-supervision baseline. Make exactly one focused change in train.py. Target only global-context aggregation or how global features are fused back into per-point features. Keep the geometry-aware local edge block unchanged. Avoid deeper local stacks, larger k, or extra neighborhood passes. Protect throughput first.
